metadata.title: Turning a 2v1 Mid Fight With Sharp Timing and Clean Headshots in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this intense 2v1 fight unfold on mid. Notice the perfect timing and precise shots that change the round. What’s your favorite clutch spot on mid?

Got a clutch like this? Share your best plays in the comments!
